info.name: HRHub API
info.description:
Complete API surface for HRHub — Auth, Employees, Recruitment, Visa, Documents, Payroll, Leave, Onboarding, Compliance, Dashboard, Reports, Notifications, Audit, Attendance, Performance, Exit, Assets, Settings, HR, Tenants (App Management), Connected Apps, Subscription, and External API.

## Quick start
1. Set `baseUrl` (default `http://localhost:4000/api/v1`).
2. Run **Auth → Login**. Token auto-saved.
3. All internal routes use `{{accessToken}}` Bearer auth automatically.

## External API (ext)
Set `extUrl` = `http://localhost:4000/api/ext` (no /v1).
Set `appKey` = your `app_live_xxx` key from Connected Apps.
Set `appSecret` = your `sk_xxx` secret (shown once at creation/regeneration).
All ext routes use `X-API-Secret: {{appSecret}}` header — no JWT needed.

## Variables
- `baseUrl`, `extUrl`, `accessToken`, `refreshToken`
- `appKey`, `appSecret` — ext API credentials
- `tenantId`, `employeeId`, `appId`, `payrollRunId`, `payslipId`, `leaveId`, `documentId`, `visaId`, `assetId`, `jobId`, `applicationId`, `interviewId`, `performanceId`, `exitId`, `notificationId`, `templateId`, `userId`, `checklistId`, `stepId`, `assignmentId`, `maintenanceId`, `holidayId`

variable.description: App secret — shown once at creation or after regeneration
App key (app_live_xxx) — shown in Connected Apps

item.name: External API (ext)
item.description: Third-party integration endpoints. Auth: URL contains {{appKey}}, header X-API-Secret: {{appSecret}}. No JWT needed.
